component.name: Spotty
component.launchable:
dev.itsfernn.Spotty.desktop
CC0-1.0 MIT
360
keyboard pointing touch
Enjoy listening to your favorite Spotify content with Spotty: a libadwaita/GTK4-based Spotify client designed for GNOME!
Spotty uses a Spotify Connect-compatible daemon (e.g. spotifyd) for playback, removing the need for native audio backend dependencies.
NOTE: Spotty requires a premium account!
Current features:
playback control (play/pause, prev/next, seeking)
play queue with shuffle option
selection mode: easily browse and select mutliple tracks to queue them
browse your saved albums and playlists
search albums and artists
view an artist's releases
view users' playlists
credentials management with Secret Service
MPRIS integration
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/itsfernn/spotty/master/data/appstream/scheme-dark.png Spotty in dark scheme
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/itsfernn/spotty/master/data/appstream/scheme-light.png Spotty in light scheme
This new maintenance release brings simple but fundamental changes.
Highlights:
Playback state is now saved and restored properly.
Minor under-the-hood improvements.
More Russian translations.
